####################
  Uniswap V3
####################

Hands-on tutorials covering the Uniswap V3 surface in DeFiPy: concentrated-liquidity pool setup with custom tick ranges, order-book-style liquidity placement using V3's tick mechanics, and machine-precision toggling for backend integration. Each notebook is runnable end-to-end against synthetic pools.

.. toctree::
    :maxdepth: 2

    tutorials/uniswap_v3.ipynb  
    tutorials/imp_loss_v3.ipynb
    tutorials/order_book.ipynb 
    tutorials/machine_precision.ipynb
